functions.test_requirement: Cover request deletion with readable service-level UTC rows: successful draft deletion, non-owner rejection, assigned-broker rejection, and accepted-freelancer rejection.

preconditions: The viewer is an authenticated client
Request req-delete is in a deletable draft status
No broker is assigned and no accepted freelancer exists
returns: Deletes request answers, broker proposals, and freelancer proposals for req-delete
Returns success=true and message='Request deleted successfully'

preconditions: The viewer is an authenticated client
Request req-delete belongs to another client
exceptions: ForbiddenException: You can only delete your own requests

preconditions: The viewer is an authenticated client
A broker is already assigned to the request
exceptions: BadRequestException: Cannot delete a request that has a broker assigned. Use Dispute or Report to resolve.

preconditions: The viewer is an authenticated client
An accepted freelancer proposal already exists for the request
exceptions: BadRequestException: Cannot delete a request that has an accepted freelancer.
